mxCell.value: Indexes are natural numbers and almost all/all indexes are used.

Do you need maping
(index-> value, or key->value) or searching in collection?
Do you need to check if the collection contains some membr often?
Do you need to remove from the collection often?
Fixed size known at compile time?

Python
There is no implementation
 included in python
Do you need the keys to be ordered?

Python
There is no such thing
in standard library
Do you need to iterate over the collection, or maintain the insertion order?
Do you need to iterate over the collection, or maintain the insertion order?

Java: there is no tuple in java
-> Create your own wrapper
class or use a Record
